userStories.title: Pre-audit: map all 29 models to source type before touching any code
acceptanceCriteria: For each of the 29 models: identify the AEAT source URL and format
Classify each as STATUS-A/B/C/D/E before writing a single line of code
Write full classification table to docs/aeat-29-audit.md
This story produces the map only; no casillas loaded
userStories.verificationCommand: test -f docs/aeat-29-audit.md && awk '/\|/{count++} END{print count}' docs/aeat-29-audit.md | grep -E '^[2-9][0-9]' && echo PASS || echo FAIL-AUDIT-MAP-MISSING

userStories.title: Fix modelo 102 and 206 nombre contamination + load casillas if available
acceptanceCriteria: 102: official AEAT name is segundo plazo fraccionamiento IRPF
206: official AEAT name is IS/IRNR document of ingreso/devolucion tied to model 200
Use M-00 status before deciding completeness or casillas
userStories.verificationCommand: docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -c "SELECT codigo, nombre FROM aeat_modelo WHERE codigo IN ('102','206');" && echo 'Verify names are correct per AEAT official' || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Load casillas for STATUS-A models identified in M-00
acceptanceCriteria: Implement ZIP/XSD parser for STATUS-A models 172 and 173
Run worker and confirm modelo_casilla rows are loaded
If parsing cannot be done safely, reclassify and document
userStories.verificationCommand: docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -c "SELECT m.codigo, COUNT(cs.id) AS casillas FROM aeat_modelo m JOIN modelo_campana c ON c.modelo_id=m.id AND c.activo=true LEFT JOIN modelo_casilla cs ON cs.campana_id=c.id AND cs.activa=true WHERE m.codigo IN ('172','173') GROUP BY m.codigo ORDER BY m.codigo;" && echo 'Verify STATUS-A models have casillas > 0' || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Handle STATUS-E models — automatable non-PDF sources
acceptanceCriteria: Write targeted parsers only for deterministic structured formats
Escalate ambiguous sources to STATUS-D
userStories.verificationCommand: test -f docs/aeat-29-audit.md && grep -q 'STATUS-E' docs/aeat-29-audit.md && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Set completeness=no-casillas-expected for STATUS-B models
acceptanceCriteria: Handle STATUS-B models 102,146,147,186,206,247
Only set no-casillas-expected if DB/API contract supports it
MCP must not describe these as evidencia limitada when verified as no-casillas by design
userStories.verificationCommand: docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -c "SELECT codigo FROM aeat_modelo WHERE codigo IN ('102','146','147','186','206','247') ORDER BY codigo::int;" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Set completeness and verified correctly for STATUS-C deprecated models
acceptanceCriteria: If M-00/M-03 identifies deprecated models, expose them as deprecated
No model is marked deprecated without official evidence
userStories.verificationCommand: test -f docs/aeat-29-audit.md && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Document STATUS-D models — Playwright-blocked or non-parseable
acceptanceCriteria: Document STATUS-D blockers in code comments or docs
Never invent fields for dynamic endpoints or schematic PDFs
userStories.verificationCommand: grep -q 'STATUS-D' docs/aeat-29-audit.md && echo PASS || echo FAIL-NO-STATUS-D

userStories.title: Verify modelo 290 stays correctly as parcial/evidence-limited
acceptanceCriteria: 290 remains verified=false/completeness=parcial until full source is found
Official FATCA XSD fields are exposed as partial official evidence, without claiming obligation or full operational completeness
userStories.verificationCommand: curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/modelos/290 | jq '{verified: .verified, completeness: .completeness, casillas: .casillas_total}' && echo 'Verify partial 290 contract' || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Update MCP response logic for completeness=deprecated
acceptanceCriteria: MCP handles deprecated completeness if/when STATUS-C exists
Existing verified/parcial logic remains untouched
userStories.verificationCommand: test -f docs/aeat-29-audit.md && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Final coverage report — 29 models resolved
acceptanceCriteria: Every model in the 29-item list has final status
mcp_validation_suite ok=true
stale_workers=0 confirmed
userStories.verificationCommand: docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -c "SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN casillas > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS with_casillas FROM (SELECT m.codigo, COALESCE(SUM(cs_count.n),0) AS casillas FROM aeat_modelo m LEFT JOIN modelo_campana c ON c.modelo_id=m.id AND c.activa=true LEFT JOIN (SELECT campana_id, COUNT(*) n FROM modelo_casilla GROUP BY campana_id) cs_count ON cs_count.campana_id=c.id WHERE m.codigo::int BETWEEN 100 AND 299 GROUP BY m.codigo) sub;" && echo 'Verify: with_casillas >= 57 baseline' || echo FAIL

workerRemediationStories.title: Evaluate undeployed TYPE-C worker modules before production promotion
acceptanceCriteria: Promote only after official source verification, idempotent writes, sync_log telemetry, retry/dead-letter behavior, Compose/systemd wiring, and MCP/API availability semantics are proven.
